app.tagline: Japanese the way it's spoken — 55% polite, 45% colloquial

home.freePace: Progress is free — this is just the suggested minimum to finish in 12 weeks.
home.behind: No rush — the pace is yours. 🍵

curriculum.title: 12-week path
curriculum.subtitle: Everything is unlocked from day one. The path marks the suggested pace, not a lock.
curriculum.comingSoon: This week's content is in production — the engine is ready for it.

flash.noCards: No cards due — come back later or learn new ones!

trace.title: Writing practice
trace.instructions: Trace the character over the model. Mind the stroke order!

dialogue.title: Chats
dialogue.subtitle: Talk with your Japanese friends — each one lives in a different register.

yuki.bio: 22, infinite energy, speaks 100% casual and loves correcting you while laughing.

haruto.bio: Works at the café by the station. Started polite, but he's getting casual with you…

kenji.bio: Always courteous, always in です・ます. Perfect for training the polite register.

hana.bio: An obaachan who gives you tangerines and speaks warm, unhurried polite Japanese.

aiko.bio: Explains everything patiently and shows you when to use each register.
